steps.title: Write each count
steps.content: The number of 11-inch parts is $n$, the number of 7-inch parts is $3n$, and the number of 4-inch parts is $28$.

steps.title: Build the total
steps.content: The machine makes $92$ parts total, so $$3n+n+28=92$$ Combining like terms gives $$4n+28=92$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is $4n+28=92$, so D is correct.
